title: steviopsis dryophila
intro: Steviopsis dryophila, also known as dwarf stevia, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, lowering blood pressure, and exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Steviopsis dryophila can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or powder form.
